name: Pinjra
overview: Pinjra is a Pakistani drama television series directed by Najaf Bilgrami, written by late-Pakistani screenwriter Asma Nabeel. The series is produced by Shazia Wajahat under banner Showcase Productions. It is set to premier on 6 October 2022 on ARY Digital with double episodes every week.

trailers.title: Pinjra | Teaser 1 | Coming Soon | ARY Digital
